title: Arthouse One-Sheet Anime Remake
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for testing whether restrained festival-poster grammar can hold recognizable anime-coded characters without losing negative space, tonal restraint, or layout discipline.

en.title: Arthouse One-Sheet Anime Remake
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for testing whether restrained festival-poster grammar can hold recognizable anime-coded characters without losing negative space, tonal restraint, or layout discipline.

zh-CN.title: 艺术电影海报换成动漫主演
zh-CN.description: 测试影展 one-sheet 的克制留白、细节层级与高级气质，能否在动漫化角色进入画面后依然成立。
